summary: iOS 🟥 INTERMITTENT | DFU/Update all not always works properly
scenario: DFU "Update All" fails intermittently when headset was connected to app during PC downgrade, leaving headset outdated and no restart option until app restart
description_clean: Intermittent issue where "Update All" (DFU) does not always work properly. Steps: Connect Falcon to app and PC via cable, downgrade Falcon via PC with PTT, unplug Falcon, plug Charge Stand to PC, downgrade Charge Stand, place Headset on Charge Stand, wait for both to appear in Software tab, tap Update All. Observed: DFU sometimes fails; after closing Houston screen and returning to Device Settings > Software tab, no option to restart update. After restarting app, Charge Stand shows as up to date while headset is outdated. Expected: DFU should work properly. Note: Issue reproducible only if headset was connected to app while being downgraded via PC.
steps: Connect Falcon to app and PC via cable
Downgrade Falcon via PC with PTT
Wait for both to appear in Software tab
expected: DFU should work properly. Both devices should update successfully.
actual: DFU sometimes fails. After closing Houston screen and returning to Device Settings > Software tab, there is no option to restart update. After restarting the app, the Charge Stand shows as up to date while the headset is outdated.
